title: Verification Cycle Module
summary: Defines the active implementation-correctness verification cycle and its caller/orchestrator contracts.
responsibility: Own the reusable verifier invocation contract, agent lifecycle rules, and mechanical validation for implementation review runs.

inputs.name: verification bundle
inputs.description: Normalized verifier invocation fields bound through the OpenSpec or standalone adapter contract.

inputs.name: caller state
inputs.description: Caller-maintained agent table and latest verifier outputs.

outputs.name: normalized verifier artifacts
outputs.description: Machine-readable findings and verifier evidence used by callers and the mechanical guard.

outputs.name: orchestrator decisions
outputs.description: Deterministic next-step decisions for resume, spawn, repair, and terminate.

external_dependencies.name: jsonschema
external_dependencies.notes: Used by verification guards and schema-aware validation tooling.

public_interfaces.name: verification-cycle-core-v1
public_interfaces.notes: Canonical shared field groups and cycle rules.

public_interfaces.name: verification_cycle_guard.py
public_interfaces.notes: Mechanical gate for review run directories.

review_hints: Read the core contract before interpreting caller-specific docs.
Treat README, VERIFY-IMPLEMENTATION, and CALLER-INTEGRATION as the fastest orientation path.
Review changes here for contract drift before reviewing Stage A caller prose.
notes: Entries capture stable architecture and review anchors rather than implementation narration.
